folksonomy.description: Folksonomija tippermetti lill-utenti jżidu tikketti apposta mal-prodotti. Fittex iċ-ċwievet kollha disponibbli hawn taħt, fittex ċwievet speċifiċi, jew ikklikkja fuq kwalunkwe ċavetta biex tara prodotti li jużawha.

home.intro_1: Open Food Facts Explorer hija għodda biex tesplora d-database Open Food Facts.
home.intro_2: Tista' ddaħħal kodiċi tal-prodott fil-bar tat-tiftix hawn fuq biex tibda jew tikklikkja fuq wieħed mill-prodotti hawn taħt.

preferences.subtitle: Your preferences are kept in your browser and never sent to Open Food Facts or anyone else.

preferences.default_description: Nutri-Score, Green-Score and food processing level (NOVA)

folksonomy.footer_after: . Don't hesitate to participate or give feedback.

datasources.title: Sorsi tad-Data
datasources.last_modified_t: L-aħħar editjar tal-paġna tal-prodott fi {date} minn
datasources.incomplete_or_incorrect: If the data is incomplete or incorrect, you can complete or correct it by editing this page.
datasources.check_be_first: Be the first to check this product

info.images: Tella' immaġni ċari tal-prodott, l-ingredjenti, u l-fatti nutrizzjonali biex tgħin lil oħrajn jidentifikaw il-prodott.
info.basic_info: Ipprovdi d-dettalji ewlenin dwar il-prodott, bħall-kwantità, l-imballaġġ, u l-manifattur.
info.origin_traceability: Provide origin and traceability information, such as manufacturing places, origins of ingredients, and traceability codes.
info.languages: Żid ismijiet u deskrizzjonijiet tal-prodotti f'lingwi differenti biex il-prodott ikun aċċessibbli għal aktar utenti.
info.ingredients: Elenka l-ingredjenti kollha preżenti fil-prodott. Dan jgħin lill-utenti b'allerġiji jew preferenzi tad-dieta.
info.nutrition: Daħħal il-valuri nutrizzjonali għal kull 100g/ml kif muri fuq l-imballaġġ. Dan jgħin lill-utenti jqabblu l-prodotti.
info.moderator_tools: These tools are only available to moderators. They allow for administrative actions like correcting the product barcode.
info.prices: Help track this product's price history on Open Prices.
info.comment: B'mod mhux obbligatorju, tista' żżid kumment biex tiddeskrivi l-bidliet tiegħek jew tipprovdi kuntest addizzjonali.
info.packaging: Describe each packaging component (bottle, cap, box, etc.) with its shape, material, and recycling instructions. You can add multiple components.

tooltips.serving_size: Dan il-valur jgħin biex isir kalkolu proporzjonali ta' kull nutrijent għal kull daqs ta' porzjon. Pereżempju, 60 g, 60 g jew 60 G (ippreferi l-ewwel wieħed), 1000 ml jew 1 L
tooltips.ingredients_list: Keep the original order. Indicate the percentage when specified. Separate with a comma or hyphen and use parentheses for ingredients of an ingredient.
tooltips.categories: Indika biss l-aktar kategorija speċifika. Il-kategoriji prinċipali se jiżdiedu awtomatikament. Pereżempju, 'Sardini fiż-żejt taż-żebbuġa', 'Meraq tal-larinġ minn konċentrat'.
tooltips.product_name: L-isem tal-prodott huwa l-isem ewlieni stampat fuq l-imballaġġ. Jista' jkun trademark irreġistrata. Pereżempju, 'Nesquik', 'Tomato Ketchup'. Tinkludix il-marka fl-isem.
tooltips.brand_name: Daħħal il-marki kollha tal-prodott. Il-marka ewlenija, ġeneralment murija b'mod ċar fuq il-pakkett ta' quddiem, għandha tiddaħħal l-ewwel. Pereżempju, 'Nutella, 'Oreo, Mondelez'
tooltips.quantity: Ikkopja l-valur indikat fuq il-prodott u tinsiex l-unitajiet. Pereżempju, 230g, 6 (għal 6 bajd), 3 x 150g (għal prodott bi 3 kaxxi, kull waħda ta' 150g).
tooltips.labels: Kwalunkwe karatteristika tal-prodott **li hija fattwali** u differenti mill-oqsma l-oħra. Pereżempju, 'Nutri-Score, NOVA…', 'Magħmul fil-Belġju, prodott fil-Brittanja…', 'ISO 9001, ISO 22000…'.
tooltips.stores: Daħħal il-ħanut minn fejn xtrajt il-prodott. Pereżempju, 'Carrefour', 'Walmart', 'Lidl'.
tooltips.origins: Żid kwalunkwe indikazzjoni tal-oriġini li tista' ssib fuq l-imballaġġ. M'għandekx għalfejn tinkwieta dwar l-oriġini indikati direttament fil-lista tal-ingredjenti. Pereżempju, 'Ċanga mill-Arġentina', 'Is-sojja ma ġejjax mill-Unjoni Ewropea'.
tooltips.traceability_code: F'din it-taqsima, tista' ddaħħal kodiċijiet relatati mal-marki tal-ippakkjar, marki ta' identifikazzjoni jew marki tas-saħħa.
tooltips.countries: Pajjiżi fejn il-prodott huwa disponibbli b'mod wiesa' (minbarra ħwienet speċjalizzati fi prodotti barranin).
tooltips.product_type: Select the type of product: Food, Beauty, Pet Food, or Other.
tooltips.empty_fiber: Enter a hyphen (-) if the value is not present on the packaging.
tooltips.allergens: List the allergens present in the product (e.g. Milk, Gluten, Eggs).
tooltips.traces: List any traces of allergens that may be present due to cross-contamination (e.g. Nuts, Soy).

edit.nutrition_issues_description: We have detected some potential issues with the nutritional information you provided. Please review the following warnings and make any necessary corrections before saving your changes.
edit.name: Name

packaging_component.quantity_per_unit_label: Quantity of product contained per unit
packaging_component.all_listed: All packaging components have been listed
packaging_component.number_of_units_desc: Enter the number of packaging units of the same shape and material contained in the product.
packaging_component.shape_desc: Enter the shape name listed in the recycling instructions if they are available, or select a shape.
packaging_component.material_desc: Enter the specific material if it can be determined (a material code inside a triangle can often be found on packaging parts), or a generic material (for instance plastic or metal) if you are unsure.
packaging_component.recycling_desc: Enter recycling instructions only if they are listed on the product.
packaging_component.weight_measured_desc: Remove any remaining food and wash and dry the packaging part before weighting. If possible, use a scale with 0.1g or 0.01g precision.
packaging_component.quantity_per_unit_desc: Enter the net weight or net volume and indicate the unit (for example g or ml).
packaging_component.recycling_instructions_desc: Write here the packaging information and/or the recycling instructions that are present on the product.
packaging_component.recycling_instructions_list: List all packaging parts separated by a comma or line feed, with their amount (e.g. 1 or 6) type (e.g. bottle, box, can), material (e.g. plastic, metal, aluminium) and if available their size (e.g. 33cl) and recycling instructions.
packaging_component.recycling_instructions_specificity: Try to be as specific as possible. For plastic, please indicate if it is opaque or transparent, colored, PET or PEHD.
packaging_component.recycling_instructions_combination: Data from this field will be combined with any data provided for each packaging part. It is possible to provide one or the other, or both.
packaging_component.recycling_instructions_examples: 1 plastic film to discard, 1 FSC carboard box to recycle, 6 1.5L transparent PET plastic bottles to recycle, 6 colored opaque plastic caps, 12 33cl aluminium cans
packaging_component.packaging_photo_desc: Photos of the packaging info and recycling instructions help to verify the data.
packaging_component.multiple_uploads_guidance: With Chrome, Firefox and Safari, you can select multiple pictures (product, ingredients, nutrition facts etc.) by clicking them while holding the Ctrl key pressed to add them all in one shot.

edit.origins: Origin of the product and/or its ingredients
edit.product_page_url_add: Link to the product page on the official site of the producer
edit.generic_name_placeholder: e.g., Chocolate chip cookies, Orange juice

missing_number.title: Serving size is missing a number
missing_number.desc: Serving size should include a numeric value. Examples: {examples}

missing_unit.title: Serving size is missing a unit
missing_unit.desc: Serving size should include a unit. Examples: {examples}

unknown_unit.title: Serving size unit may be incorrect
unknown_unit.desc: Serving size should include a common unit. Examples: {examples}

edit.legal_warning_photos_1: Ittellax ritratti li m'intix tiegħek jew li m'għandekx id-drittijiet għalihom. It-tlugħ ta' immaġnijiet bid-drittijiet tal-awtur mingħajr permess huwa illegali u jista' jirriżulta fis-sospensjoni tal-kont tiegħek.
edit.legal_warning_photos_2: Ittella' biss ir-ritratti tiegħek stess jew dawk li għandek permess espliċitu biex tuża.

qr.barcode_scanned_not_found: Il-barcode {barcode} ġie skennjat b'suċċess, iżda ma nstab l-ebda prodott fil-Fatti Miftuħa dwar l-Ikel, Fatti Miftuħa dwar is-Sbuħija, Fatti Miftuħa dwar il-Prodotti jew Fatti Miftuħa dwar l-Ikel għall-Annimali Domestiċi tagħna.

network.title: Żball fil-Konnessjoni
network.message: Ma rnexxiex nikkonnettja mas-server tal-Open Food Facts. Jekk jogħġbok iċċekkja l-konnessjoni tal-internet tiegħek u erġa' pprova.
network.instructions: Jekk il-problema tippersisti, żur il-Paġna tal-Istatus tal-Fatti dwar l-Ikel Miftuħa.

landing.title: Esploratur Miftuħ tal-Fatti dwar l-Ikel
landing.subtitle: Database kollaborattiva, bla ħlas u miftuħa ta' prodotti tal-ikel minn madwar id-dinja. Skopri, fittex, u kkontribwixxi għat-trasparenza tal-ikel għal kulħadd.
landing.explore_products_desc: Fittex miljuni ta’ prodotti tal-ikel, ara fatti dwar in-nutrizzjoni, u agħmel għażliet infurmati.
landing.help_improve_desc: Help us improve Open Food Facts by editing or answering questions about these products.

dashboard.html_title: Profil tal-Utent - {user} - Iftaħ l-Esploratur tal-Fatti dwar l-Ikel
dashboard.title: Profil tal-Utent ta' {user}

explore.title: Esplora Fatti dwar l-Ikel Miftuħ
explore.subtitle: Skopri prodotti li huma trending, kategoriji popolari, u kkontribwixxi għat-trasparenza tal-ikel!
explore.trending_products_desc: Ara liema prodotti qed jiġu l-aktar meqjusa u editjati bħalissa.
explore.popular_categories_desc: Fittex l-aktar kategoriji ta' ikel popolari fid-database tagħna.
explore.recently_added_desc: Agħti ħarsa lejn l-aħħar prodotti miżjuda mill-komunità.
explore.contribute_now_desc: Għin biex ittejjeb Open Food Facts billi żżid jew teditja prodotti, jew twieġeb mistoqsijiet.
explore.random_product_desc: Tħossok xortik tajba? Skopri prodott każwali mid-database tagħna.
explore.learn_more_desc: Skopri kif jaħdem Open Food Facts u kif tista’ tgħin.

compare.hint_relative_best: 💡 Percentages show difference compared to the best value (lower is better for most nutrients)
